description: Touch + keyboard-playable piano with white/black-key layout, Web Audio API tone synthesis (oscillator + ADSR envelope), and responsive portrait orientation. No samples — synthesizes notes from frequency math, so no missing-asset failures.
qualityNotes: Hand-curated from mchatai.com/hub/com.mchatai.miniApp.piano (publisher GI1GHQ7w). Uses Web Audio API tone synthesis (no audio sample base64), QWERTY key bindings + click/touch on keys, ADSR envelope. Preserve the synth-only audio path — don't introduce sample loading.
